stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which of the following statements is correct regarding the alerts given by a Terrain Awareness and Warning System (TAWS)?

options.a: “Terrain ahead, Terrain ahead” – you have 30 NM to respond.
options.b: “Terrain, Terrain, Pull up” – you have 30 NM to respond.
options.c: “Terrain, Terrain, Pull up” – you have 60 seconds to impact.
options.d: “Terrain ahead, Terrain ahead”– you have approximately 60 seconds to impact.
